global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic 3/4 angled overhead view of a kitchen-table scene showing a single printed HVAC quote document from a local family-owned shop, lying on a warm walnut wood table. The document occupies the central 50% of the frame, slightly lower than center to leave room for headline text above. The document has a small ASH-style logo in the upper-left corner (a stylized 'ASH' type-mark in red and blue), and a clear bold dark green header banner that reads '0% APR FOR 36 MONTHS — APPROVED' with a green checkmark. A pair of relaxed adult hands rests beside the document — palms partly open, calm, not gripping. To one side, a ceramic coffee mug with steam rising. To the other side, a smartphone face-down on the table. Soft warm morning natural light flows from the upper-right. The image has THREE additional text overlay elements composited as part of the final designed ad: (1) a small narrow red horizontal sash spanning the very top edge of the frame containing the bold all-caps white text 'PHOENIX HOMEOWNERS' centered, (2) very large bold all-caps white sans-serif headline text '0% APR. PRICE MATCH. NO REGRETS.' positioned in the upper-third of the frame above the document, with subtle dark drop-shadow for legibility, (3) a tall solid bright red horizontal banner spanning the entire bottom edge of the frame, approximately 12% of image height, containing the bold all-caps white text 'FREE IN-HOME ESTIMATE • 602-905-1450' centered. Text overlays rendered crisply and cleanly. Photorealistic, shot on 50mm lens.

lighting.source: soft window light from upper right

composition.framing: medium close-up, document fills central 50% of lower frame, headline space above
composition.focal_point: the headline '0% APR. PRICE MATCH. NO REGRETS.' above the document

the three text overlays form a clear hierarchy: audience selector → hook → CTA
rendered text MUST be crisp, legible, free of spelling errors
